name: mcp-feedback-enhanced
description: Interactive feedback collection for AI assistants with multi-session tabs

commands.title: MCP Feedback Enhanced: Open in Editor (Tab)
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Open in Bottom Panel
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Reconnect to Server
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Force Reset (Restart Server)

scripts.vscode:prepublish: cd mcp-server && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/generate-webview.js --prod && node scripts/validate-build.js && npm run esbuild-base -- --minify && npm run verify
scripts.compile: cd mcp-server && npm run build && cd .. && tsc -p ./ && node scripts/generate-webview.js && node scripts/validate-build.js && npm run esbuild && npm run verify
scripts.verify: node -e "const h=require('fs').readFileSync('out/webview/panel.html','utf8');const e=require('fs').readFileSync('out/extension.js','utf8');const checks=[];if(!h.includes('{{SERVER_URL}}'))checks.push('Missing SERVER_URL placeholder');if(!e.includes('retainContextWhenHidden:!0')&&!e.includes('retainContextWhenHidden: true'))checks.push('retainContextWhenHidden should be true');if(!e.includes('panel.html'))checks.push('Missing panel.html reference');if(checks.length){console.error('ERRORS:',checks.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('Verify OK')"
scripts.test:fast: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/hooks.test.js tests/ws-server.test.js tests/panelState.test.js tests/panelState.model.test.js tests/contracts.test.js tests/scenarios.test.js
